display_text: Grove Bow, Tier 1: Neutral item providing a Magic Amp passive effect. Reduces magic resistance of the attacked enemy by 20% for 6 seconds. Enables physical attackers to amplify subsequent magic damage from their team, providing a unique hybrid utility. Stats: MR Reduction: 20%, Debuff Duration: 6s.
